File: eewaltz.mma

Groove: Eewaltzintrowalk

Notes: A try at doing something for traditional Slavic, dreary waltzes. We're using a name convention "Eastern European Waltz" simply because "EE" is much shorter than "Russian"). This was written for "Dark Eyes". Note: For strumming we emulate a balalaika which has 3 strings. We using a EEA (Prima) tuning, but you can change this if you want.

Author: Bob van der Poel

Description: A 4 bar intro with walking bass.

SeqSize: 4 Time (beats per bar): 3.0

Track Name: Plectrum

Voice/Tones: Koto Articulate: 5
Unify: 0 Octave: 5
Volume: 100 Harmony: None
Rskip: 10 Rvolume: 0
Rtime: 0 SeqRND: Off
Strum: None

Track Name: Walk

Voice/Tones: AcousticBass Articulate: 80
Unify: 0 Octave: 3
Volume: 110   100   70   40 Harmony: None
Rskip: 10 Rvolume: 20
Rtime: 20 SeqRND: Off
Strum: None
